% auto-generated by papers/scripts/systematics_postfix/systematicsPostfix.C (POST-FIX, 2026-06-09)
% production chain: post-fix tebSigma + in-event veto + continuous fiducial; variants post-hoc
% on identical stored events. Supersedes the pre-fix paperSystematics.C table.
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Selection-systematic budget for the brightest-1000 $(\mathrm{DW}-\mathrm{UP})/2$
time resolution at $150$~GeV, recomputed with the production estimator chain. Each row is the
shift of $\sigma_t(150)$ under one selection variation on identical events; the total is the
RMS of the shifts. The floor block gives the DSB1 fit floor and its fit-range stability.
The timing-method choice (srCFD vs.\ cfd05/LED) is treated in Sec.~\ref{sec:method-gain}
with its own paired uncertainty and is not folded in here. Notes: the MIXED module-wide
estimator is ill-posed (Sec.~\ref{sec:mixed}; its same-shower ratio carries $\pm0.05$
energy-period scatter and $<0.01$ run-jackknife spread); TENERGY times with three
capillaries ($\sqrt{4/3}$ statistical penalty); LuAG and TENERGY floors are extrapolations
(Sec.~\ref{sec:thesis}).}
\label{tab:syst}
\footnotesize
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{4pt}
\begin{tabular}{@{}lcccc@{}}
\toprule
Variation & DSB1 & TENERGY & MIXED & LUAG \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{5}{l}{\emph{shift in }$\sigma_t(150)$\emph{ [ps]}}\\
$K{=}500$ & $-1.7$ & $-1.4$ & $-0.2$ & $+2.4$ \\
$K{=}2000$ & $+1.7$ & $+1.7$ & $+1.4$ & $-1.0$ \\
$r_{\mathrm{fid}}{=}2.5$~mm & $+1.2$ & $-0.6$ & $-0.0$ & $-2.8$ \\
$r_{\mathrm{fid}}{=}3.5$~mm & $-0.5$ & $+0.4$ & $+0.7$ & $+3.9$ \\
MCP$\,{<}700$~mV & $-0.3$ & $-0.2$ & $+1.1$ & $-0.3$ \\
HG$\,{\ge}30$~mV & $+0.0$ & $+0.0$ & $+0.0$ & $+0.0$ \\
veto $1.5$~ns & $-0.5$ & $-2.3$ & $+0.1$ & $+0.0$ \\
veto $3.0$~ns & $-0.2$ & $+0.0$ & $+1.5$ & $+0.0$ \\
\midrule
nominal $\sigma_t(150)$ & $25.7$ & $30.3$ & $39.6$ & $44.4$ \\
total syst. & $\pm1.0$ & $\pm1.1$ & $\pm0.9$ & $\pm1.9$ \\
\midrule
